heading: Wednesday Night
text: Rising chance of rain or snow showers, brief freezing rain possible far north.
temperature: Upper 20s to lower 30s north, mid to upper 30s south

heading: Thursday
temperature: Mainly upper 40s to mid 50s north, mid 50s to around 60 south

heading: Friday
text: Chance of an early snow shower. Blustery.

heading: Saturday
temperature: Mid 20s to lower 30s north, low to mid 30s south
